cli-commands.note: Added missing providers list/remove subcommands. Fixed misleading 'MCP server required' labels (runs in-process). Corrected stale subcommand counts across CLAUDE.md docs. Value 8.

Wired dead synthesis subsystem into 5 new MCP tools (prompt/register/status/promote/cleanup). All end-to-end verified. Value 8, honesty_gap 2.

memory-system.note: Wired CacheManager (368 lines) into LanceDBBackend hot read path. Fixed broken test suite (2 orphan tests, 1 stale assertion). Deduplicated chunkDocument in document-pipeline.ts. 78/78 tests pass. Value 8.

guidance-package.note: GuidanceHookProvider wired into session-restore. Shard retrieval, ledger tracking, diff-size gate now fire at runtime. Value 7->8.

mcp-server.note: 326 tools, 0 dead registrations, 0 collisions, clean TypeScript, 958 tests pass. Value 8.

routing.note: Feedback loop closed: routing-feedback.jsonl now adjusts agent confidence via loadFeedbackWeights (TTL-cached, +/-0.10 adjustment). Value 7->8.

hook-handlers.note: All handler data pipelines have consumers. last-dispatch.json dedup wired. 962 tests pass. Value 8.

router-system.note: Exposed @monomind/routing semantic pipeline as hooks_route_semantic MCP tool. Full embedding+LLM-fallback stack now reachable by agents. Fixed misleading agent --task comment. Value 8.

skills-system.note: Pruned 23 phantom entries from SKILLS_MAP. Created real memory-toolkit and github-toolkit skills. Init wizard defaults now deliver actual content. Added regression guard for missing skills. Value 8.

swarm-agents.note: Unified CLI/MCP swarm state paths (.swarm/ -> .monomind/swarm/). Agent counts from real MCP store. Value 7->8.

hive-mind.note: Fixed 3 integration bugs: camelCase flag parsing (votes/proposals broken), consensus strategy not persisted from init, audit trail gated behind unset env var. All CLI hive-mind commands now functional end-to-end. Value 8, honesty_gap 2.

daemon-system.note: Fixed 5/12 workers missing from DEFAULT_WORKERS (ultralearn/deepdive/benchmark/refactor/preload untriggerable). Added benchmark.json consumer to route-handler. All 8 producing workers now consumed. Value 8.

neural-system.note: Unified neural-tools embedding pipeline with shared embedding-operations.ts. MCP and CLI neural paths now use same vector space. Smoke-tested end-to-end. Value 8.

intelligence-system.note: Fixed 2 TS errors in intelligence.ts (loadFromDisk type safety). Bridged MCP trajectory recording into ReasoningBank confidence-learning loop. 0 TS errors now. Value 8.

monofence.note: All integration points verified. Added 2 missing MCP tools (scan_output, context). 8 MCP tools now cover full API. Value 9.

cross-deduplication.note: Fixed 6th unclaimed cosine-sim duplicate in memory-read.ts. Migrated 8 more atomic-write sites (6 files) to shared json-file.ts. 9 files now use writeJsonFileAtomic. Value 8.

cross-daemon-pipeline.note: All 8 producing daemon workers now consumed by route-handler (benchmark.json added in run 19). Pipeline complete. Value 8.

cross-hooks-architecture.note: Fixed critical dead-bridge bug: CJS handlers run as separate processes so _hooksModule was always null. Added _ensureHooksModule() lazy per-process loader. AgentSpawn bridge added to agent-start-handler.cjs. All 5 handlers now bridge correctly. Value 7->8.
